archetype: Archetype 4: Swiss & High-Contrast (Premium Corporate Real Estate Variant)

typography.h1: text-4xl sm:text-5xl lg:text-6xl font-bold tracking-tight text-[#0A192F]
typography.h2: text-2xl sm:text-3xl lg:text-4xl font-semibold tracking-tight text-[#0A192F]

spacing_and_layout.grid_bento: grid grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-8 lg:grid-cols-12 gap-6 lg:gap-8
spacing_and_layout.grid_dashboard: grid grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-3 lg:grid-cols-4 gap-4 sm:gap-6

components.button_primary: bg-[#0A192F] text-white hover:bg-[#112240] transition-colors rounded-lg px-6 py-3 font-medium shadow-sm hover:shadow-md
components.button_secondary: bg-[#C5A880] text-white hover:bg-[#b09470] transition-colors rounded-lg px-6 py-3 font-medium shadow-sm hover:shadow-md
components.button_outline: bg-transparent border border-slate-300 text-[#0A192F] hover:border-slate-400 hover:bg-slate-50 transition-colors rounded-lg px-6 py-3 font-medium
components.card: bg-white rounded-xl border border-slate-200 shadow-[0_4px_20px_rgba(10,25,47,0.03)] hover:shadow-[0_8px_30px_rgba(10,25,47,0.06)] transition-shadow duration-300
components.badge_success: bg-emerald-50 text-emerald-700 border border-emerald-200 px-3 py-1 rounded-full text-xs font-semibold
components.badge_danger: bg-red-50 text-red-700 border border-red-200 px-3 py-1 rounded-full text-xs font-semibold
components.input: w-full rounded-lg border border-slate-300 bg-white px-4 py-3 text-slate-900 focus:border-[#0A192F] focus:ring-2 focus:ring-[#0A192F]/20 focus:outline-none transition-all
components.glass_header: bg-white/80 backdrop-blur-xl border-b border-slate-200/50 sticky top-0 z-50
components.success_card: bg-emerald-50 border-2 border-emerald-500 rounded-2xl p-8 text-center shadow-[0_8px_30px_rgba(16,185,129,0.15)]
components.not_qualified_watermark: absolute inset-0 flex items-center justify-center pointer-events-none z-10 overflow-hidden

instructions_to_main_agent: Use standard Tailwind CSS utility classes.
Ensure all interactive components (buttons, links, inputs) have a 'data-testid' attribute in kebab-case representing their role.
For the 'NOT QUALIFIED' watermark, render a large rotated text block with opacity (e.g., text-red-500/20 text-9xl font-bold -rotate-12 pointer-events-none) overlaid on the content area.
For the SSN handling notice, visibly integrate the secure_data badge image next to the file upload or input field to build trust.
Admin dashboard should utilize a compact layout with a sidebar (w-64) and a main content area. Use the 'glass_header' class for sticky navs if required.
Property detail page must feature an immersive image gallery utilizing the provided interior/exterior images.
Use the verified_listing badge on property cards to establish trust.
Implement the multi-step form with clear visual progression (stepper/progress bar) using the brand's navy or gold color for completed steps.
Apply fonts Outfit for Headings and DM Sans for Body by including them in index.css using @import from Google Fonts.
